page_title: "authzx_application Resource"
description: "Manages an AuthzX application."
---

# authzx_application

An application is a top-level container for your authorization model. All resource types, subjects, roles, and policies belong to an application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "authzx_application" "example" {
  name        = "My Application"
  description = "Application for managing document access"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Application name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Application description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Application ID.

## Import

Applications can be imported using their ID:

```shell
terraform import authzx_application.example <application-id>
```
